summary.zh: 检查帧率、主线程长任务和掉帧，定位动态卡顿。
summary.en: Inspect frame rate, long main-thread tasks, and dropped frames to diagnose jank.

definition.zh: 每秒绘制的帧数；60fps 是流畅运动的基线，新款显示器可达到 120fps。
definition.en: Frame rate counts rendered frames per second; matching the display refresh cadence produces the smoothest result.

purpose.zh: 通过帧率、长任务和掉帧定位运动卡顿，并建立可复现的性能基线。
purpose.en: Diagnose motion jank through frame rate, long tasks, and dropped frames with a reproducible performance baseline.

frequency.zh: 在代表性设备、关键动效变更和发布前执行；高风险页面纳入持续监测。
frequency.en: Run on representative devices, after key motion changes, and before release, with ongoing monitoring for high-risk pages.

trigger.zh: 由性能录制、自动基准或真实用户监测触发，覆盖冷启动和稳定状态。
trigger.en: Trigger from performance recordings, automated benchmarks, or real-user monitoring across cold and steady states.

enterExit.zh: 指标面板即时更新，不使用会干扰测量结果的装饰入场动画。
enterExit.en: Update metrics immediately without decorative entrance motion that contaminates measurements.

interruptibility.zh: 录制可随时停止并保留样本；重复测试使用同一脚本和设备条件。
interruptibility.en: Allow recording to stop while preserving samples, and repeat tests with the same script and device conditions.

gestureRules.zh: 滚动、拖拽和点击测试使用一致手势轨迹，自动化与人工路径相互校验。
gestureRules.en: Use consistent gesture paths for scroll, drag, and click tests, cross-checking automated and manual runs.

reducedMotion.zh: 分别测试默认与 reduced-motion 模式，确认低动态路径也没有长任务。
reducedMotion.en: Measure default and reduced-motion modes separately, confirming the low-motion path also avoids long tasks.

reviewNotes.zh: 区分帧率、单次丢帧和可见卡顿。
reviewNotes.en: Distinguish frame rate, an individual dropped frame, and visible jank.

reviewNotes.zh: 在 60Hz 与高刷新率设备上记录目标。
reviewNotes.en: Record targets on both 60Hz and high-refresh displays.
